# Type Alias: IAirline

> **IAirline** = `IAirlineWithTicketNumber` \| `IAirlineWithBookingReference`

Defined in: [src/types/payments/airline.type.ts:52](https://github.com/WEBzaytsev/yookassa-ts-sdk/blob/a630c10d01fabd8cdfaf36f2b07476b4a58137e4/src/types/payments/airline.type.ts#L52)
